summary: Billing Toggle & Consolidated Tabs Testing - All 20 tests PASSED. Frontend tests: 6 billing toggle tests, 8 consolidated tabs tests, 6 Rook's Tips tests.

breakdown.billing-toggle.spec.ts: 6/6 passed - Monthly/Yearly toggle, price updates, monthly equivalents, pricing tiers
breakdown.consolidated-tabs.spec.ts: 8/8 passed - Maps, NPCs, Chronicle, Combat, Tools, Inventory consolidated tabs with sub-tabs
breakdown.rooks-tips-consolidated.spec.ts: 6/6 passed - Rook's Tips guides for all consolidated tabs, dismiss persistence

success_rate.backend: N/A (no new backend changes, auth API verified working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features tested: 1) Billing Toggle - Landing page pricing section has Monthly/Yearly toggle with data-testid='billing-monthly-btn' and 'billing-yearly-btn'. Monthly: Hero/Quest Master £3.99, Legendary £5.99. Yearly: Hero/Quest Master £39.99, Legendary £59.99. 2) Consolidated Tabs - Campaign Dashboard now uses consolidated tabs: Maps (data-testid='maps-consolidated-tab' with subtabs 'maps-subtab-world' and 'maps-subtab-local'), NPCs, Chronicle, Combat, Tools, Inventory. Each has sub-tab navigation. 3) Rook's Tips - Each consolidated tab shows RookGuide with data-testid='rook-guide-{tabId}'. Guide dismissal persists in localStorage under 'rook_guides_dismissed' key.

features: Toggle to Yearly shows yearly prices
Toggle back to Monthly restores prices
All 4 pricing tiers displayed (Free, Hero, Quest Master, Legendary)
Shows relevant tips for each consolidated tab
